tracks.label: Parakeet 110M NeMo MLX
tracks.lane: Local Python Apple Silicon MLX Service
tracks.status_detail: Legacy /ws/stream local Apple Silicon MLX service artifact. It remains published for comparison history, but the live leaderboard now waits for a paced /v1/stt/stream replacement.

tracks.label: Faster-Whisper Small
tracks.status_detail: Legacy /ws/stream artifact using the default service model. It remains visible only as supporting evidence until a paced /v1/stt/stream replacement lands.

tracks.label: Parakeet 110M NeMo
tracks.status_detail: Legacy /ws/stream Compose CPU artifact refreshed on 2026-06-19. It stays in the supporting section until a paced /v1/stt/stream replacement is checked in.

tracks.label: Qwen MPS
tracks.status_detail: Legacy /ws/stream local Apple Silicon MPS artifact refreshed on 2026-06-20. It stays visible as supporting evidence only until a paced /v1/stt/stream replacement is checked in.

tracks.label: Faster-Whisper Base
tracks.status_detail: Legacy /ws/stream artifact refreshed on 2026-06-15. It stays published as buffered-WebSocket supporting evidence only until a paced /v1/stt/stream replacement is checked in.

tracks.label: Parakeet 0.6B Compose
tracks.status_detail: Legacy /ws/stream Compose CPU artifact. The buffered websocket contract is now treated as lower-performance supporting evidence pending /v1/stt/stream regeneration.

tracks.label: Qwen Compose
tracks.status_detail: Legacy /ws/stream Compose CPU artifact refreshed on 2026-06-19 using float16, three REST runs per sample, and an 8-chunk cadence. It now stays in supporting context only until /v1/stt/stream regeneration replaces it.
tracks.run_command: BENCHMARK_SAMPLE_COUNT=5 BENCHMARK_REST_RUNS=3 BENCHMARK_PARTIAL_INTERVAL_CHUNKS=8 QWEN_COMPOSE_DTYPE=float16 BENCHMARK_RESULT_DATE=2026-06-19 make benchmark-compose-qwen

tracks.label: Pipecat E2E Faster-Whisper Base
tracks.status_detail: Checked-in single-sample Pipecat E2E artifact refreshed on 2026-06-19 using synthesized real-time speech normalized to 16 kHz, 20 ms source frames, and 100 ms websocket chunks. It stays out of the homepage leaderboard until comparable Pipecat E2E artifacts exist across multiple backends.
